description: Milestone 3b: Authenticated Discourse API clients (Forum + Messages) using the session from Milestone 3a. Implement read-only forum browsing and basic private messages listing/reading. No posting. Robust error handling.

userStories.title: Implement DiscourseAPI client scaffolding (authenticated)
userStories.description: Create a DiscourseAPI client using AuthenticatedHTTPClient with base URL https://diskussion.piratenpartei.de. No UI changes yet.
acceptanceCriteria: DiscourseAPI client exists with baseURL and request helpers
All requests use AuthenticatedHTTPClient and attach Authorization: Bearer <access_token> when authenticated (or chosen auth mechanism documented)
Networking is async/await and errors map to domain errors
Context7 consulted for Discourse API authentication patterns and endpoint conventions; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Fetch and display latest topics from /latest.json
userStories.description: Replace FakeDiscourseRepository with RealDiscourseRepository that fetches latest topics via authenticated /latest.json and maps to domain models.
acceptanceCriteria: RealDiscourseRepository implements DiscourseRepository and fetches /latest.json
Topic list maps API response into Domain Topic model (no leaking raw JSON models into UI)
Forum tab shows real latest topics with loading/empty/error states
Unauthenticated state shows a clear prompt to login
Context7 consulted for latest Discourse API response shape and mapping guidance; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Topic detail: fetch posts for a selected topic
userStories.description: Implement topic detail screen that loads posts for a topic (read-only).
acceptanceCriteria: Selecting a topic navigates to a detail view
Detail view fetches posts for that topic via Discourse API (endpoint documented in code comments and/or Docs/DECISIONS.md)
Posts map into Domain Post model and render with author + content excerpt
Error states do not crash; provide retry
Context7 consulted for Discourse topic detail endpoint and response fields; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Messages: list private message topics (inbox)
userStories.description: Implement repository methods and UI to list private messages (read-only).
acceptanceCriteria: Messages tab displays a list of PM threads (subject, last activity)
PM list is fetched via Discourse API using authenticated requests (endpoint documented)
Domain model for MessageThread exists or reuse Topic with a clear discriminator
Loading/empty/error states are implemented
Context7 consulted for Discourse private messages endpoints and required params; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Messages: read a private message thread
userStories.description: Implement a message thread detail screen (read-only).
acceptanceCriteria: Selecting a message thread navigates to detail
Detail fetches posts in the PM thread and renders them
Sensitive content is not logged; debug logs scrub identifiers
Context7 consulted for Discourse PM thread reading endpoint and safe handling guidance; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Auth error handling across API clients
userStories.description: Ensure 401/403 results consistently trigger re-auth flow without loops and present clear UI.
acceptanceCriteria: 401/403 from Discourse calls triggers a single re-auth transition and stops further retries
UI shows a clear 'session expired, please log in again' message
No infinite refresh loops; backoff or single-attempt rule documented
Context7 consulted for recommended patterns around token refresh + API retry; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Document Discourse integration decisions and remaining gaps
userStories.description: Record endpoints used, auth mechanism chosen, and what is not yet implemented (posting, notifications, attachments).
acceptanceCriteria: Docs/DECISIONS.md lists Discourse base URL, endpoints used, and auth mechanism
Docs/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md updated with: sending messages/posting, rate limiting, pagination strategy, search strategy
Context7 consulted for any version-specific Discourse API notes relevant to endpoints used; summary added to progress.txt
